blocks.title: DeterministicFollowUps
rows: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the fallback channel policy.

rawData.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.

resultPayload.note: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.

evidence.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
evidence.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of a fallback channel policy when the preferred channel is blocked. However, the evidence does not provide explicit confirmation that the system implements this policy, particularly in the context of the linked use case which describes a scenario where SMS is blocked due to quiet hours and an email is sent instead. This indicates a gap in the requirement coverage as the evidence does not sufficiently demonstrate that the fallback mechanism is consistently applied across all relevant scenarios.
gaps: Lack of explicit evidence confirming the implementation of a fallback channel policy when the preferred channel is blocked.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the fallback channel policy.
